task.goal: Rebrand display name '7Greens' -> '7G Greens' across all UI / copy / metadata
Verify build passes with zero errors (build, lint, typecheck)
Photo optimization for 27 product catalog - audit sizes, compress, verify formats
SEO audit - meta tags, Open Graph, structured data (JSON-LD)
Accessibility audit - WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, axe-core, keyboard nav
